tracks.meaning: of a size, amount, or degree that is between small and large; neither extreme
a person or agency that conveys information or acts as an intermediary between parties
a person believed to communicate with spirits of the dead or access supernatural knowledge
a material or substance used as the vehicle for pigment in painting, such as oil or water
the material or surface on which something is printed or inscribed
the intervening substance or environment in which organisms live or develop
a substance providing the environment or base for a chemical reaction or process
material used to record, store, or transmit information such as magnetic tape or digital format
a financial instrument or asset class that is between the riskiest and safest investment options
neither hot nor cold; at a moderate temperature
a person of average or middling ability or importance
